# ClaireAI — AI Legal Receptionist
> ClaireAI is an AI-powered virtual receptionist built for law firms. It answers every call in 0.8 seconds, qualifies leads, books consultations, and sends retainers — in English or Spanish, 24/7/365.

## Company
- Legal name: ClaireAI, Inc.
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Miami, FL, USA
- Website: https://theclaireai.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/theclaireai

## Product
ClaireAI is a cloud-based AI receptionist that replaces missed calls with signed retainers. Key capabilities:

- 24/7 call answering in 0.8 seconds (no hold music, no voicemail)
- Bilingual intake (English and Spanish)
- Autonomous lead qualification (police reports, fault, medical treatment, statute of limitations)
- Consultation booking directly into attorney calendars
- Retainer automation via DocuSign and PandaDoc
- CRM integration (Clio, Filevine, MyCase, Lawmatics, PracticePanther, Salesforce, HubSpot)
- Conflict checking against existing client database
- Call recording with transcript storage

## Pricing
- Starter: $650/month (solo practitioners, up to 100 calls/month)
- Growth: $1,299/month (small firms, up to 500 calls/month)
- Enterprise: $2,999/month (multi-office firms, unlimited calls)
- No per-minute billing. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

## Practice Areas
- [Personal Injury](https://theclaireai.com/solutions/personal-injury): Qualifies MVA, slip-and-fall, and premises liability leads. Checks police reports, fault, and medical treatment status.
- [Criminal Defense](https://theclaireai.com/solutions/criminal-defense): 24/7 urgent felony and DUI case routing with instant attorney escalation.
- [Family Law](https://theclaireai.com/solutions/family-law): Sensitive bilingual intake for custody, divorce, and protective order cases.
- [Immigration Law](https://theclaireai.com/solutions/immigration-law): 10+ languages supported. Visa deadline tracking. Cross-timezone consultation booking.

## Compliance
- SOC 2 Type II certified
- HIPAA compliant
- 256-bit AES encryption
- 99.9% uptime SLA

## FAQ
- Q: How fast does ClaireAI answer calls?
  A: ClaireAI answers every call in 0.8 seconds on the first ring, 24/7/365 — no hold music, no voicemail.

- Q: What languages does ClaireAI support?
  A: ClaireAI supports English and Spanish natively, with 10+ additional languages available for immigration law firms.

- Q: Does ClaireAI integrate with my CRM?
  A: Yes. ClaireAI integrates with Clio, Filevine, MyCase, Lawmatics, PracticePanther, Salesforce, and HubSpot. New contacts, matters, and calendar entries are created automatically.

- Q: Can ClaireAI send retainer agreements?
  A: Yes. ClaireAI checks the statute of limitations, sends retainers via DocuSign or PandaDoc, and follows up — all autonomously while attorneys sleep.

- Q: How much does ClaireAI cost?
  A: Plans start at $650/month with no per-minute billing and no hidden fees. Enterprise plans for multi-office firms start at $2,999/month.

- Q: Is ClaireAI compliant with legal industry standards?
  A: Yes. ClaireAI is SOC 2 Type II certified, HIPAA compliant, uses 256-bit encryption, and maintains a 99.9% uptime SLA.
